message:
docs(plan): document comprehensive architectural enhancements (ref: 989535d)

This commit adds a version marker and documents the extensive architectural
enhancements that were included in commit 989535d ("Add Section 39: REST API
Design Patterns"). That commit added ~1,200 lines covering both the REST API
section AND significant cross-cutting architectural improvements that deserve
detailed documentation for future reference.

The architectural enhancements from 989535d include:

## Runtime Architecture & Compilation

### SkillPack Runtime Cache
- Added `SkillPack` struct storing precompiled artifacts for low-latency
  load/suggest operations:
  - Parsed spec, pre-tokenized slices, embeddings
  - Predicate pre-analysis for conditional block evaluation
  - Provenance pointers for evidence lookup
- New `.ms/skillpack.bin` artifact (or per-skill pack objects)
- Added `skill_packs` SQL table with hash-based invalidation:
  - spec_hash, slices_hash, embedding_hash, predicate_index_hash
- Config section: [cache] with skillpack_enabled, skillpack_path

### Multi-Target Compilation
- Added `CompileTarget` enum: Claude, OpenAI, Cursor, GenericMarkdown
- `ms compile --target <target>` generates agent-specific frontmatter
  and tool-call hints from the same SkillSpec
- Same source spec, different output optimizations per agent platform

### Single-Writer Daemon (msd)
- Optional `msd` daemon holds hot indices/caches in memory
- Serializes writes for safer concurrent access
- CLI becomes thin client when daemon is running (lower p95 latency)
- Config section: [daemon] with enabled flag
- New commands: msd start/status/stop

## Pattern Mining Pipeline

### Session Segmentation (Phase-Aware Mining)
- Added `SessionPhase` enum: Recon, Hypothesis, Change, Validation,
  RegressionFix, WrapUp
- Tool-call boundaries + language markers prevent phase bleed
- Enables phase-specific pattern extraction (e.g., validation patterns
  only from validation phases)

### Pattern IR (Typed Intermediate Representation)
- Added `PatternIR` enum for compiled patterns before synthesis:
  - CommandRecipe: shell commands with context
  - DiagnosticDecisionTree: structured troubleshooting
  - Invariant: safety rules with severity
  - Pitfall: anti-patterns with counterexamples
  - PromptMacro: reusable prompt templates
  - RefactorPlaybook: step-by-step refactoring guides
  - ChecklistItem: actionable checklist items
- Normalizes commands, filepaths, tool names for deterministic dedupe

### Uncertainty Queue Enhancements
- Added `auto_mine_attempts` and `last_mined_at` fields to UncertaintyItem
- Precision loop generates 3-7 targeted CASS queries per uncertainty
  (positive, negative, boundary cases)
- Auto-run when idle or via `ms uncertainties --mine`
- Stops on confidence threshold (active learning pattern)

## Security & Provenance Hardening

### Provenance Compression (Three-Level Storage)
- Added `EvidenceLevel` enum:
  - Pointer: hash + message range only (cheap default)
  - Excerpt: minimal redacted excerpt for quick review
  - Expanded: full context fetchable from CASS on demand
- Added `level` field to EvidenceRef struct
- Trades storage cost vs. audit convenience

### Reassembly Resistance
- Added `SecretType` enum: ApiKey, AccessToken, Email, Phone, Hostname,
  Filepath, CustomerData, Other
- Added `secret_id` and `secret_type` to RedactionFinding
- Stable secret_id prevents combining partial excerpts across rules
  to reconstruct secrets
- High-risk secret types blocked from excerpt storage entirely

### Forensic Quarantine Playback
- Added safe_excerpt, triggered_rule, replay_command to InjectionFinding
- Stores minimal safe context with hash for later investigation
- Replay requires explicit user invocation (safe by default)

### Non-Removable Policy Slices
- Added `SliceType::Policy` for safety/policy invariants
- Added `MandatoryPredicate::Always` - always include regardless of budget
- Packer fails closed if policy slices cannot fit in budget
- Ensures critical safety rules are never silently omitted

## Packing & Retrieval Optimization

### Pack Contracts
- Added `PackContract` struct defining minimum guidance guarantees:
  - required_groups: ["critical-rules", "validation"]
  - mandatory_slices: specific slice IDs that must be included
  - max_per_group: optional cap per group
- Named contracts: DebugContract, RefactorContract, DeployContract
- Packer fails closed if contract cannot be satisfied
- Config section: [pack_contracts] mapping task types to contracts

### Bandit-Weighted Signal Selection
- Added `SignalBandit` struct for adaptive retrieval weighting
- Contextual bandit learns per-project weights over signals:
  bm25, embeddings, triggers, freshness, project_match
- Uses usage/outcome rewards instead of static tuning
- Config section: [bandit] with enabled, min_samples
- Added `bandit` field to Suggester struct

### Injection-Time Optimization
- Added `recent_slice_ids` to PackConstraints for novelty penalties
- Boosts missing facets (pitfalls/validation) based on task fingerprint
- Avoids redundant loading of already-injected slices

### Swarm Roles
- Added `SwarmRole` enum: Leader, Worker, Reviewer
- Added `role` field to AgentPack
- Role-aware pack distribution:
  - Leader: decision structure + pitfalls
  - Worker: commands/examples
  - Reviewer: semantic diff + safety invariants
- Enables specialized packs in NTM multi-agent scenarios

## Experimentation Framework

### Slice-Level Experiments
- Added `ExperimentScope` enum: Skill, Slice
- Added `scope` and `scope_id` fields to SkillExperiment
- Experiments can now target individual slices (rule wording, example
  blocks) while keeping rest of skill constant
- Enables faster A/B convergence on specific content

### Local Reservation Fallback
- Added `skill_reservations` SQL table for advisory file locks
- Compatible semantics with Agent Mail: path_pattern, holder, exclusive,
  expires_at
- ms bridges to Agent Mail when available, falls back to local DB

## Configuration & Commands

### New Config Sections
- [compiler]: default_target, block_markdown_edits
- [cache]: skillpack_enabled, skillpack_path
- [bandit]: enabled, min_samples
- [pack_contracts]: task-to-contract mapping
- [daemon]: enabled
- [perf]: emit_latency for p50/p95/p99 in health output

### New/Updated Commands
- ms compile --target claude|openai|cursor|generic-md
- ms edit --import-markdown (opt-in Markdown repair)
- ms review <skill> (semantic diff grouped by rule type)
- ms doctor --check=perf, --preflight --context
- ms load --pack --preview (live preview of packed content)
- msd start/status/stop (daemon management)

### Reordered Phasing
Updated implementation priority order:
1. Spec-only editing + compilation + semantic diff
2. Index + skillpack artifacts + fast suggest/load
3. Provenance compression + taint/reassembly resistance
4. Mining pipeline + Pattern IR
5. Swarm orchestration + bandit scoring
6. TUI polish + bundles + auto-update

---

This version marker (2026-01-13.39) tracks that the plan now includes
Section 39 plus all the architectural enhancements documented above.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
